Name: CameraExFollowImpactParam
Description: Defines parameters relating to the camera during backstabs, ripostes and guard breaks.

Fields.Name: Start Time
Fields.Description: The duration (in seconds) before this camera is applied.

Fields.Name: Shake Time
Fields.Description: The duration (in seconds) of the shake period after starting.

Fields.Name: End Time
Fields.Description: The duration (in seconds) after which this camera ends.

Fields.Name: Field of View %
Fields.Description: The field of view multiplier, after adjustment. 100 is no change.

Fields.Name: Distance %
Fields.Description: The distance multiplier, after adjustment. 100 is no change.

Fields.Name: Shake Count
Fields.Description: The number of shakes during the shake period.

Fields.Name: Field of View %: During Shake
Fields.Description: The field of view multiplier, after adjustment during a shake. 100 is no change.

Fields.Name: Distance %: During Shake
Fields.Description: The distance multiplier, after adjustment during a shake. 100 is no change.
